title: How to make car payments and pay your Wells Fargo auto loan | Wells Fargo

sections.name: Hero Marquee
sections.background: image-based (photo of woman on phone with yellow/gold tones)
sections.style: dark text on image background, centered text overlay
sections.overview: Full-width marquee image with heading and subtext about payment options

sequences.description: Full-width marquee image showing woman on phone, with centered heading 'Choose your way to pay' and subtext 'Make individual auto loan payments or set it and forget it with automatic payments.'

sections.name: Auto Loan Payment Options (Tabs)
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, tabbed content below with icons
sections.overview: Section heading followed by a tabbed interface showing payment methods (Online, Phone, Mail)

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Auto loan payment options' with decorative line above

Tabbed content interface with 3 tabs (Online, Phone, Mail), each with a distinctive icon. Online tab has description about enrolling in online banking and 'Get started' CTA. Phone tab shows automated payment system info with number 1-800-289-8004. Mail tab shows mailing address for checks/money orders to Wells Fargo Auto PO Box.

sections.name: Autopay Promo
sections.style: accent background, large image on left, heading and text with CTA on right
sections.overview: Full-width promotional banner for Autopay feature with image and text side by side

sequences.description: Large promotional banner with full-width gold background. Image of woman on left side, heading 'Autopay lets you focus on what matters' on right, descriptive paragraph about Autopay debiting monthly from checking/savings account, and a 'Sign on' CTA button

sections.name: Related Questions (FAQ)
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, expandable FAQ items below, centered CTA button at bottom
sections.overview: FAQ accordion section with 4 expandable questions and a link to review all FAQs

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Related questions' with decorative line above

Four expandable question-and-answer pairs (accordion style): 'Can I make my car payment in advance?', 'How do I set up, change, or cancel automatic loan payments?', 'How do I change my payment due date?', 'Where can I find my payoff amount for my auto loan?'
Centered secondary button labeled 'Review all FAQs' linking to /help/loans/auto-loans-faqs/

sections.name: Customer Support
sections.background: white with cards having gold gradient backgrounds
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, icon-based cards below in a 3-column grid
sections.overview: Section heading followed by grid of 3 support resource cards with icons

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Customer support' with decorative line above

Grid of 3 items, each with a small icon (64x64) on gold gradient background, heading, description text, and a link. Items: 'Help with auto loan payments' (chat icon, 'Learn more' link to /auto-loans/assist/), 'Auto financing' (car icon, 'Let's go' link to /auto-loans/vehicle-financing-101/), 'Call us' (phone icon, phone number 1-800-289-8004 with business hours Mon-Sat)

sections.name: Footnotes and Disclaimers
sections.overview: Legal footnotes, terms references, and document codes

sequences.description: Numbered footnotes: 1) Mobile carrier coverage and rates disclaimer, 2) Terms and conditions for Online Access Agreement. Followed by document codes QSR-12062026-8049532.1.1 and LRC-0925

localBlocks.name: hero
localBlocks.purpose: Large heading, text, buttons, optional background image for page intro

localBlocks.name: cards
localBlocks.purpose: Grid of items with images/icons and text

localBlocks.name: accordion-faq
localBlocks.purpose: Expandable question and answer sections (FAQ format)
